description:
The PRD tab is read-only. Six lifecycle client methods exist but are never called from any component: `approvePrd`, `requestChanges`, `getStatus`, `launch`. The project detail has no way to move a project through its lifecycle from the UI.

**What to do:**
- Add action buttons to `ProjectHeader` or `PrdTab` based on current project status:
  - Status `reviewing` → show "Approve PRD" and "Request Changes" buttons
  - Status `approved` → show "Launch" button (with optional maxConcurrency input)
  - Status `researching` / `drafting` → show status indicator only (no action)
- Wire buttons to `api.lifecycle.approvePrd()`, `api.lifecycle.requestChanges()`, `api.lifecycle.launch()`
- After action, refetch project to reflect new status
- "Request Changes" should open a modal/textarea to capture feedback string before calling

**Files to touch:**
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/components/project-header.tsx`
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/tabs/prd-tab.tsx`
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/hooks/use-project.ts`
title: Project page: wire PRD lifecycle actions (Approve, Request Changes, Launch)
